user.description: Select the Robomow device you want to add to Home Assistant and enter the mainboard serial number.

bluetooth_confirm.description: Enter the mainboard serial number for the Robomow device you want to add to Home Assistant.

error.invalid_mainboard_serial: The mainboard serial number is invalid. Verify it and try again.
error.model_unsupported: The mower model is not supported.
error.device_not_found: The Robomow device could not be found. Move closer and try again.
error.service_not_found: The required Robomow Bluetooth service was not found on this device.
error.characteristics_not_found: The required Robomow Bluetooth characteristics were not found on this device.

abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not a supported Robomow mower.

unsupported_device.message: This device model is not supported

next_departure.name: Next Departure
next_departure.description: Time in minutes until the next scheduled departure

previous_departure.name: Previous Departure
previous_departure.description: Time in minutes since the last scheduled departure

expected_duration.name: Expected Duration
expected_duration.description: Expected duration of the current operation in minutes

no_depart_reason.name: No Departure Reason
no_depart_reason.description: Reason why the mower did not depart at the scheduled time

starting_point_a.name: Starting point A
starting_point_a.description: Distance in meters from the base station to the first starting point

starting_point_b.name: Starting point B
starting_point_b.description: Distance in meters from the base station to the second starting point

wire_signal_type.name: Wire signal type
wire_signal_type.description: Signal type used for the perimeter wire detection
